scripts.lint: pnpm exec biome check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json biome.json tsdown.config.ts .npmrc .gitignore
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --skipLibCheck --types node tsdown.config.ts && pnpm -r --if-present typecheck
scripts.typecheck:repo: pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --skipLibCheck --types node tsdown.config.ts
scripts.test:repo: [ -n "$SKIP_TEST" ] || pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.workspace.ts --project repo
scripts.test:type: [ -n "$SKIP_TEST" ] || { pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run test:type; }
scripts.test:lint: [ -n "$SKIP_TEST" ] || { pnpm run lint && pnpm -r --if-present run test:lint; }
scripts.build: pnpm -r --if-present build && pnpm run test:type:repo && pnpm run test:lint:repo && pnpm run test:repo && pnpm --filter ./modules/contract run openapi:check && pnpm run test:changeset
scripts.gcm: git fetch origin && git checkout origin/main
